response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 1 as '気まぐれメルシィ' (Kimagure Mercy) from on-screen text. Performed search: 'Kimagure Mercy Hachioji P Japanese and English lyrics'. 2. Identified song 2 as '喰ライ' (Kurai) from on-screen text. Performed search: '"喰ライ" かいりきベア 歌詞'. 3. Extracted lyrics and mapped them to the identified scenes. Used the artist 'Hachioji P' for the first song and 'Kaiki Bear' for the second as per video credits.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance video featuring VTuber La+ Darknesss. The video consists of two song performances: 'Kimagure Mercy' by Hachioji P and 'Kurai' by Kaiki Bear, with a short talking segment in between.

scenes.description: VTuber La+ Darknesss performs 'Kimagure Mercy' on stage. Title and artist info appear on-screen.
scenes.song_title: Kimagure Mercy (気まぐれメルシィ)
scenes.performer_in_video: La+ Darknesss (ラプラス・ダークネス)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ほらほらまた始まった
お得意の自己弁護 言い訳
「でもね」「だって」
ほらほらまた始まった
ごめん!
心臓が震えて言えない
私は気まぐれメルシィ
手を繋いで、夢みたいな恋
私は気まぐれメルシィ
ねえねえ、そんな目で見ないで
私は気まぐれメルシィ
本当の私を見せるから
私は気まぐれメルシィ
(Full lyrics are long, this is a representative excerpt)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, hey, it's started again
Your usual self-defense, excuses
"But...", "Because..."
Hey, hey, it's started again
Sorry!
My heart is trembling, I can't say it
I'm just a fickle Mercy
Holding hands, a love that feels like a dream
I'm a fickle Mercy
Wait, wait, don't look at me like that
I'm just a fickle Mercy
I'll show you my true colors
I'm a fickle Mercy
(Full lyrics are long, this is a representative excerpt)

scenes.description: La+ Darknesss performs her original song 'Kurai' on stage. Title and artist info appear on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: La+ Darknesss (ラプラス・ダークネス)

心まで Lap Lap…
常闇で
Lap Lap Lap Lap
焼き付けて
そばで笑いかける悪魔の声が
鳴り響いて ぐるるるる
U.F.O. U.F.O. ディア U.F.O.
本能 翻弄 絡め取られて
I for U.F.O. ディア U.F.O.
Lock on 濃厚

Dreaming sweet dreams
Until my heart is Lap Lap...
In the darkness
Lap Lap Lap Lap
Burn it into me
The voice of the devil smiling by my side
Ringing out, grururu

Instinct, at the mercy of, entangled
